products.name: Retinol Alternative Moisturiser
products.description: This lightweight moisturizer delivers retinol-like anti-aging benefits without any irritation, helping to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. It is infused with Bidens Pilosa extract, a natural retinol alternative, making it a gentle yet effective choice for daily use. It provides deep hydration, ensures skin feels nourished and smooth, revealing a radiant, refreshed complexion.
